folio.label: 85r
folio.l: If I the excuse , thougú thow shuldest be spilt´
Allas q¶ she , god wot I haue no gilt
Paie me q¶ he , or by the swete Seynt Anne
As I wol bere a wey , thy newe panne
For dette , whicú æè owest me of olde
Whan æè madest thyn husbonde , Cokewolde
I paid at hom , for thyn correcciouö
¢ Thow lixt q¶ she , be myn saluaciouö
Ne was I neuäe or now , wydewe ne wyf
Somound vn to ©oure court , in al my lyf
Ne neuäe I nas , but of my body trewe
Vn to the deuele blak , & row of hewe
ñeue I thy body , and my panne also
And whanne the deuele , herd hire cursen so
Vp on hire knees , he seide in this manere
Now Mabily , myn owen moder deere
Is this ©oure wylle in ernest , that ©e seye
The Deuele q¶ she , so fecche hi~ or he deye
And panne and al , but he wol hi~ repente
Nay olde stot , that is nat myn entente
Quod this Sompnoå , for to repente me
For ony thyngö , that I haue had of the
I wold I had thy smok , and euäy clotú
Now brother q¶ the deuele , be nat wrotú
Thy body and this panne , ben myne be rigút
Thow shalt to helle , witú me , ©et to nygút
There thow shalt knowen , of oure pryuete
More than a Maister , of dyuynyte
And witú that word , this foul fend hi~ hente
Body and soule , he witú the Deuele wente
Where as theise Sompnoures , han here heritages
And god that made , aftir his Image
Man kynde saue , and gyde , vs alle and some
And leue this Sompnour , good man to bycome
¢ Lordynggis I coude haue told ©ow , q¶ this Frere
Had I had leyser , for this Sompnour heere
After the tixt of crist , Poule and Ioún
And of oure othere Doctoures , many oon
Swiche peynes , that ©oure hertes mygút a gryse
Al be it so , no tonge may it deuyse
Thougú that I mygút , a thousand wynter telle
The peynes of that cursed hous , in helle
But for to kepe vs , fro that cursed place
Waketú and preyetú , iúu for his grace
So kepe vs , fro the temptour Sathanas
Herkenetú this word , by war as in this cas
The lyouö sittetú , in his wayte alwey
To slee the Innocent , if that he may
